info.english_meaning: to grow to collect to dishonor

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'sUdaH sUpOdanaM dadyAt pradehAMSca susaMskftAn' (suSruta0 146501) pradehaH pralehaH
'yo'yaM saMvatsare yajYaH sa sandihyate' (mI॰17.47 sUtre SA॰BA॰) tadvizaye sandeho BavatItyarTaH
'karotikiratI sandigDO varzakarmaRA' (ni॰2.9) sandigDO=sandehasya vizayaH tasya sandidihe
'parvatasamIpaM gatastadgate cAgnO sandihAnaH' (tarkaBAzA) sandihAnaH sandehaM kurvARaH

'aTa sandehayAnAnAM dfzwvA spfzwvA ca pArTivam yattadASaNkitaM pApaM tasya jajYe viniScayaH' (rA॰2.65.15).. sandehayAnAnAm iti svArTe Ric AgamaSAstrasyAnityatvAnmuNna kftaH so'yaM mugaBAvaH kvAcitko RiNantasya kamerRyantAnAM ca kezAYcicCAnaci dfzwo netaratra
'tasya kzatajasandigDaM jAtarUpaparizkftam vimucya kavacam …' (BA॰strI॰20.8) atra sandigDaM digDamevAha samSabdo DAtvarTAnuvAdI
'varRAnAM ca sandeho yugAnte ravinandana' (mAtsya pu0 16518) sandehaH saMkaraH
'caturviSvarUpaH prARaH pfTagvartmAtmA sandeho bahulaH' (CAM0 u0 5182) sandeho dehasya maDyaBAgaH
'nipetuH SoRitAdigDA DaraRyAM pAvakopamAH' (rA0 3312) AdigDA Izad digDAH
'yaTA'DoBUmO nidigDaM tadamuyA syAdevaM tat' (Sa0 brA0 17213) nidigDaM lepi nidigDikA spfSI vyAlI ityamaraH pfSniparRyA nAmaDeyezu paWati
'UrjaM vA etaM rasaM pfTivyA uddihanti yad valmIkam' (tE0 A0 528) utkzipantItyarTaH
'yadvijAman paruzi vandanaM BuvadazWIvantO pari kulPO ca dehat' (f0 7502) paridehat sarvata upalimpet
'lohAnAM ca maRInAM ca malapaNkopadigDatA' (kA0 nI0 sA0 724)
'maDvABadantAH suviBaktadehA na copadigDA na kfSAH kzamASca' (gajAH) (va0 bf0 saM0 671) upadigDA medaupacayavanta upacitA medasvinaH medurAH
'pillikAmupadehaM ca nacirAdeva nASayet' (kA0 saM0 Kila0 kukkuRaci0 Slo0 40)
